title: Phase 31CD — Qwen2.5-1.5B Real-Activation Capture Micro-Probe (Option A)
scope: Option A HF-derived real-activation proxy micro-probe. L0 only, last prefill token, prompt='The capital of France is' (5 BPE tokens), shape [1, 1536], batch=1, dtype=bfloat16 (downcast to float32 for replay). Replay W_ref is the local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (NO W_ref source pivot). W_low is corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K derived from the Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref. SDIR is ffn_up+ffn_gate k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual. NO aggregate validation, NO multi-layer sweep, NO multi-prompt sweep, NO generation, NO inference output, NO llama.cpp runtime integration, NO model files / HF cache / raw activation arrays / Q2_K blobs / SDIR blobs committed.
forbidden_actions_upheld: no Q2_K encoding/artifact generation for disk persistence (replay only)
no SDIR residual/artifact generation for disk persistence (replay only)
no multi-layer sweep (L0 only for first execution)
no multi-prompt sweep (single prompt per 31CD scope)
no exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation claim (Option A is an HF-derived proxy)
no claim of HF safetensors forward-pass equivalence to Q4_K_M GGUF forward pass
no claim that real activations behave like synthetic Gaussian
no model quality / behavior / speed / runtime / inference / production claim
no model files committed (HF safetensors, GGUF, raw activations all stay outside repo)
no Q2_K/SDIR blobs committed (replay materials kept in-memory only)
no raw activation arrays committed (sha256 + metadata only in result JSON)
no commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval

config.model: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct (HF safetensors) for X; Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF (local) for W_ref
config.x_source: HF-derived real-activation proxy; NOT exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation
config.w_ref_source: local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized, matches 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ convention
config.w_low_source: corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K derived from the Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref (mode=corrected_ceil_per_row)
config.sdir_source: ffn_up + ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual

activation_capture.x_storage_policy: raw X written only to tempfile.mkdtemp; deleted at runner exit; sha256 + shape + dtype + norm + max_abs are the only X-derived fields in the result JSON
activation_capture.capture_path: HuggingFace transformers AutoModelForCausalLM + register_forward_pre_hook on mdl.model.layers[0].mlp; input_ids tokenized with add_special_tokens=False; X = hook_input[:, -1, :] (last prefill token), downcast bf16->float32 for replay

classification_reason: corrected Q2_K + SDIR improved cosine and MAE simultaneously on the HF-derived real-activation proxy at L0, last prefill token, prompt='The capital of France is', shape=[1, 1536], dtype=float32
next_allowed_phase_if_clean: 31CE (Option A multi-prompt / multi-layer extension, only if explicitly requested) OR 31CF (Option B llama.cpp instrumentation, only if explicitly requested and operator permission granted) — both require explicit operator approval at entry
next_allowed_phase_if_blocked: 31CD-R (Real-Activation Capture Repair, only if explicitly requested)
interpretation: 31CD Option A captured the real L0 pre-FFN activation at the last prefill token of prompt 'The capital of France is' via the HF safetensors forward pass (bf16). The activation is labeled an HF-derived real-activation proxy; it is NOT the exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation. Replay used the local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized as W_ref (NO W_ref source pivot) with corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K W_low and ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual. delta_cos=+0.001130, MAE_delta=-0.000229, per_layer_margin=+3,380,374 bytes, all finite={'Y_ref': True, 'Y_low': True, 'Y_sub': True}. This is a single-prompt / single-layer / single-token-position micro-probe; results do NOT generalize to other prompts, other layers, other token positions, other models, or to runtime inference. No claim that the result reproduces or contradicts synthetic-Gaussian tensor-harness behavior.
